verification_metadata.primary_source_pdf: CMS State Operations Manual Appendix PP
verification_metadata.verification_method: Downloaded live CMS PDF and verified tag starts with pypdf text extraction. Page numbers are PDF page numbers.
verification_metadata.batch2_merge_note: Merged Batch 2 Appendix PP rows when no live Rev. 232 row already existed. Existing live-verified rows were preserved.
